steps.title: Identify the possessive relationship
steps.content: The straw is bound around the threads of the single screw inserted into it — we need a singular noun to show possession of the threads.

steps.title: Apply the possessive rule
steps.content: A singular noun takes 's to show possession. Screw's threads correctly expresses the threads of the one screw. Options A and D create malformed possessives, and B uses a plural possessor when only one screw is mentioned. That matches choice C — C is correct.
